headline: M&T Bank's Q1 Earnings on the Deck: Here's What You Should Know
summary: MTB's Q1 results, scheduled for April 15, are likely to reflect higher NII and loan growth, while fee income gains may help offset rising expenses.

headline: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp M&T Bank Expectations Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
summary: M&T Bank Corp (NYSE: MTB) to release Q1 earnings on 4/15, expected EPS of $4.00 and revenue of $2.42B. Recently announced $5B buyback plan. Analysts give mixed ratings.
